title: Clothesless
description: This transparency mod communicates with the server your currently loaded mods and resource packs.
body:
This mod enables more transparency towards a server. The mod sends the current mod- and resourcepack configuration of the client to the server. This allows the server administrators to ensure that only modifications approved by the server are used. This increases fairness on the server that is visited.

### For server operators
The information that this mod sends to the server can be viewed via the plugin message channel. Please note that the messages sent are not secure and could be falsified. It should therefore not be seen as “proof” that mod XY is being used, but only as an indication.

---
